**What & why**
<!-- Summary of the change and the motivation. -->

**Checklist**
- [ ] `make build test` passes (gofmt clean, vet, unit tests)
- [ ] If `api/` types or `+rbac` markers changed: ran `make manifests generate` and committed the result
- [ ] Added/updated tests (unit for pure logic, envtest for reconcile flows) where relevant
- [ ] Updated docs/samples if behavior or config changed
